name: gallup_remote_covid_battery_anchor
guidance: Anchor answers in concrete job constraints and work-from-home experience rather than preferences alone. Use middle percentage and frequency categories for partial remote compatibility.

job_remotability: some tasks can be done remotely
most or all job tasks can be done remotely
pre_pandemic_remote_experience: rarely or never worked from home before February 2020
sometimes worked from home before February 2020
frequently worked from home before February 2020
workplace_interaction: frequent face-to-face interaction with customers or other organizations
home_productivity: less productive at home than at the workplace
about equally productive at home and workplace
more productive at home than at the workplace
covid_workplace_concern: low concern about workplace COVID exposure
moderate concern about workplace COVID exposure
high concern about workplace COVID exposure
future_remote_preference: expects and prefers returning mostly onsite
expects and prefers mostly remote work
response_style: uses middle percentage/frequency categories for partial remote fit
answers strongly only when job constraints are clear
answers in a way anchored to concrete job tasks rather than preferences alone
